Influence Q&A with Dr. Cialdini
Ask Your Questions to Dr. Cialdini
Join an exclusive Q&A session with Dr. Robert Cialdini, world-renowned expert in influence and persuasion psychology. Dr. Cialdini
will share insights on the Principles of Persuasion and how you can ethically apply them. Ask him anything about applying the
principles of influence into your life and business. Don't miss this opportunity to learn directly from the master himself!
Influence Q and A
www.getwsodo.com
